title: Welcome to the World Composting Blog!
summary: A first look at what's coming to our new blog section.
content:
Welcome to the official World Composting blog! 

I am excited to start sharing more detailed stories, deep dives into composting techniques, and gear reviews right here on this site. This blog will complement our YouTube channel, providing a written space for troubleshooting guides, checklists, and project updates that you can read at your own pace.

Stay tuned for more updates coming soon!

title: Welcome to the World Composting Blog
summary: Our first post! Learn about the basics of composting and why it matters for our planet.
content: Composting is a magical process that turns kitchen scraps into "black gold" for your garden. In this post, we'll explore the essentials of starting your own pile...
